have h_no_rupert : ∀ (q : Pose), q ∈ row.toPoseInterval → ¬ RupertPose q nopert.hull := by
      intro q hq
      have h₁ : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq
      have h₂ : ∀ (q : Pose), q ∈ row.toPoseInterval → ¬ RupertPose q nopert.hull := by
        -- Extract the property from the ValidSplit assumption
        have h₃ : ∀ (q : Pose), q ∈ row.toPoseInterval → ¬ RupertPose q nopert.hull := y.2
        exact h₃
      exact h₂ q h₁
    -- Assume the contrary and derive a contradiction
    intro h
    obtain ⟨q, hq, hq_rupert⟩ := h
    have h₃ : ¬ RupertPose q nopert.hull := h_no_rupert q hq
    exact h₃ hq_rupert
